data.body: Consideration: [Reliability] When detect-stack.sh returns an unsupported or unknown stack type, generate-semgrep-config.sh produces a config with mandatory rulesets only (p/security-audit, p/owasp-top-ten, p/cwe-top-25). Onboarding should warn the user that no language-specific rulesets were selected and suggest running generate-semgrep-config.sh again after adding project manifests.
